title: Sub-agent handoff list
description: Ordered list of sub-agents the helper is asking the orchestrator to dispatch via `handoff::dispatch_all`. Each entry maps 1:1 to a `Handoff` constructed by the Rust dispatcher — index, agent type, can-fail flag, and the absolute prompt-file path. Validates both the embedded `state_updates.handoffs` field on a `waiting_for_handoffs` envelope and the standalone payload accepted by `plan-executor validate --schema=handoffs`.

index.description: 1-based position used for `# output sub-agent <N>:` blocks on triage re-entry. Indices must be unique within the array.

agent_type.description: Subprocess to dispatch. Maps to the corresponding `agents.<type>` entry in `~/.plan-executor/config.json`.

can_fail.description: When true, a non-zero exit from this sub-agent does not abort the wave; the orchestrator emits a `skipped` marker and continues.

prompt_file.description: Absolute path to the prompt file the sub-agent reads as its sole task input. The path must exist and live under the helper's `execution_root` — the dispatcher rejects symlink traversals.
